name: WGS84 ↔ Arc 1960 Helmert round-trip (Kenya)

source.notes: Position Vector transformation (EPSG operation method 9606). Helmert 7-parameter. Same parameters as used by Kenya Survey Department and most GIS software for Kenya.

cases.name: Nairobi (KNOWN control point)
cases.notes: Round-trip WGS84→Arc1960→WGS84 must reproduce the original lat/lon to within 1e-7 deg (~11mm at the equator). Height to within 1e-4 m.

rounding: Full float64 throughout. Round only at display time.
